state.next-action: Shipped draggable floating composer launcher (`PageComposerFloatingLauncher`, quick `quick-2026-04-08-composer-draggable-floating-launcher`) and fixed service-grid media target drift (`.planning/debug/resolved-service-grid-media-target-lane-sync.md`): composer media targeting now syncs the visible service/pricing lane on canvas.
